scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/types && npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=backend && npm run lint --workspace=frontend
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace=packages/types && npm run type-check --workspace=backend && npm run type-check --workspace=frontend
scripts.postinstall: prisma generate --schema=$([ -f backend/prisma/schema.prisma ] && echo backend/prisma/schema.prisma || echo frontend/prisma/schema.prisma)
